name: Soup Time Cat Creamy Treats Tuna & Cod Fish 70g
shortDescription: Soup Time Creamy is a nutritious and hydrating lickable treat your cat will love. Serve it in a dish or let your furry friend enjoy it straight from the tube as a special reward. Made with premium natural ingredients, it’s packed with essential nutrients to support your cat’s health and add variety to their diet. Perfect on its own or as a tasty topper for dry food.
